evidence_summary: Execute a high-intensity combat climax involving multi-faction skirmishing, culminating in the death of Sab Than and the stabilization of the platform by Tars Tarkas.

A chaotic skirmish breaks out between Carter, the Tharks, and the Zodangan guards. Sab Than attempts to strike Dejah Thoris, but Carter intervenes and kills him. Tars Tarkas arrives to secure the platform, leaving only the victors in the hall.
Skirmish erupts with Tharks and Zodangan guards clashing in the audience chamber.
Tars Tarkas secures the platform; only victors remain among fallen guards.
Carter intervenes to stop Sab Than from striking Dejah Thoris, killing him in the process.
